data.title: Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP investigates claims for Vistagen investors from Apr 1, 2024 to Dec 16, 2025. Contact James Wilson for details.
data.description: Securities Litigation Partner James (Josh) Wilson of Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP is urging investors affected by Vistagen to reach out to him directly to explore their potential options. If you bought or obtained securities in Vistagen during the period from April 1, 2024, to December 16, 2025, and are interested in having a conversation about your situation, please get in touch with Mr. Wilson.

data.title: ChoiceOne Bank partners with FHLBank Indianapolis to award Fresh Coast Alliance $1 million grant in Jan 2026.
data.description: In Sparta, Michigan on January 22, 2026, ChoiceOne Financial Services, Inc. and ChoiceOne Bank (NASDAQ: COFS) revealed a collaboration with the Federal Home Loan Bank of Indianapolis (FHLBank Indianapolis) to grant Fresh Coast Alliance a $1 million Affordable Housing Initiative award.

data.title: Investing in alternative assets is on the rise, expected to reach $24 trillion in 2028 from $15 trillion in 2022. Global regulations are uneven, with Europe tightening oversight and Asia advancing faster. Alternatives offer unique diversification, lower risks, resilience in turbulent times, and tangible investments in the real economy.
data.description: The global pandemic has led to a surge in investing in alternative assets, such as private equity, real estate, and tokenized funds. The industry is expected to grow from $15 trillion in 2022 to over $24 trillion by 2028. However, regulations for these assets vary across regions. Europe is tightening oversight, the UK is experimenting with new rules, and Asia is progressing rapidly. This regulatory fragmentation poses challenges for the industry. Alternative investments are attractive due to their unique and diverse assets, lower interconnectedness reducing risks, and the opportunity to invest in the real economy. Alternatives also offer resilience during turbulent times, as they show lower correlation to public equities. This trend highlights the importance of monitoring the market and understanding new regulations.

data.title: MATIC aims for $0.45-$0.52 recovery in 4-6 weeks, potential 18-37% gains despite bearish pressures.
data.description: The cryptocurrency Polygon (MATIC) is aiming for a price recovery between $0.45 and $0.52. Currently trading at $0.38, it is considered oversold which could potentially lead to gains of 18-37%. Despite ongoing bearish momentum near crucial levels, there is optimism for an upward trend in the near future.

data.title: Neurophos receives $110M Series A funding to launch Exaflop-Scale Photonic AI Chips.
data.description: Neurophos has successfully raised $110 million in their Series A round to introduce groundbreaking Exaflop-Scale Photonic AI Chips. This important funding milestone was achieved on January 22, 2026. The announcement was made by Neurophos through a news release issued via PR Newswire. The company has indicated that significant adjustments have been implemented. Additional information regarding this development is detailed at the conclusion of the revised release.

data.title: AI Inspection Market to reach $102.42 billion by 2032, growing at 17.5% CAGR from 2025. Market data includes 274 tables and 64 figures.
data.description: In Delray Beach, Florida, as of January 22, 2026, the AI Inspection Market is anticipated to increase significantly from a value of USD 33.07 billion in 2025 to reach USD 102.42 billion by 2032. This growth is expected to occur at a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 17.5% between 2025 and 2032. The market insights provided by MarketsandMarkets™ suggest promising figures, with 274 market data Tables and 64 Figures available to browse, reflecting the upward trajectory of the industry.

data.title: Inventor from Lantana, Fla. develops T T BOOK baby teether & book to provide safe teething experience for infants.
data.description: In Pittsburgh, on January 22, 2026, an inventor from Lantana, Florida, shared the inspiration behind the creation of the T T BOOK. The inventor aimed to offer a secure option for teething babies to enjoy storybooks without the risk of them chewing on paper. This innovative design addresses the concern of baby safety and provides a solution for parents looking for teething-friendly alternatives.

data.title: Freedom250 Trucks start nationwide tour in Greensboro, NC on Jan 21, 2026. IMLS-funded exhibit to travel across US for 250 years celebration.
data.description: A series of traveling exhibits funded by the IMLS highlighting America's founding and celebrating 250 years has commenced its tour across the United States. The inaugural stop took place on January 21, 2026, in North Carolina with the Freedom 250 Freedom Truck. The exhibit aims to commemorate the nation's history and heritage through a journey that will span multiple locations nationwide. This event marks the beginning of an extensive tour that will visit numerous states, offering an engaging experience to audiences across the country.

data.title: Trump threatens 10% tariff on 8 European allies opposing Greenland deal, impacting Supreme Court ruling.
data.description: The US president, Donald Trump, has warned that he may impose an extra 10 percent tariff on eight European countries as of February 1. This move comes in response to their resistance against his desire to purchase Greenland. The situation has heightened with implications for an upcoming Supreme Court decision.

data.title: UBS names Google a quantum computing 'pioneer' with industry-leading stocks flagged for volatility risks. Quantum advantage may arrive in 2030s. Multiple qubit production methods identified.
data.description: UBS, led by analyst Madeleine Jenkins, has highlighted several top quantum computing stocks that are at the forefront of the industry due to the technology's "extraordinary potential." The market for quantum computing is currently fragmented and immature, with significant opportunities in areas like molecular simulation, optimization, AI, and cryptography. Recent advancements in quantum technology have been labeled as "meaningful breakthroughs" despite the slow progress. UBS forecasts that the era of quantum advantage, where quantum systems outperform classical ones significantly, could come as soon as the 2030s. The report points out that qubits, the fundamental units of quantum computing, can be created in various ways, with superconducting and trapped-ion qubits leading the field. More information is available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Stock futures plunge as Trump escalates tariff threats, Dow Jones -1.66%, S&P 500 -1.79%, Nasdaq 100 -2.23%, 10-year Treasury bond yield 4.28%, 2-year bond 3.57%, SPY down 1.40% at $682.01, QQQ declined 1.67% to $610.68, BHP Group down 1.65%, Alibaba dropped 2.35%.
data.description: U.S. stock futures dropped following previous declines, with major benchmark indices showing lower futures as President Trump's threat of tariffs on Europe over the Greenland dispute continued to affect global markets. The 10-year Treasury bond yield was at 4.28%, and the two-year bond at 3.57%. The FedWatch tool by CME Group projected a 95% likelihood of the Federal Reserve maintaining current interest rates in January. Index performance showed Dow Jones -1.66%, S&P 500 -1.79%, Nasdaq 100 -2.23%, and Russell 2000 -2.17%. Pre-market, SPY was down 1.40% at $682.01, and QQQ declined 1.67% to $610.68. BHP Group was 1.65% lower despite raising copper production guidance. Alibaba Group dropped 2.35% due to ByteDance's challenge.

data.title: Bolt partners with Playfinity for in-game commerce in a large portfolio of Japanese game IPs.
data.description: In-game commerce for a vast collection of Japanese game IPs such as Lode Runner, Ring King, and Zanac will be facilitated by a payments and checkout platform. Bolt, a renowned player in checkout, identity verification, and payments, is set to drive this initiative. The platform is expected to revolutionize the gaming industry by ensuring seamless and efficient transactions. This development, officially announced on January 22, 2026, in San Francisco, marks a significant milestone for Bolt as it continues to establish itself as a leader in the industry.(Note: This text is a paraphrased version of the provided news information, with important numbers included)

data.title: Divi Resorts gives up to $300 off Caribbean stays with longer bookings at resorts in Aruba and more.
data.description: Enjoy greater discounts the extended your stay at popular resorts in Aruba, Barbados, Bonaire, St. Croix, and St. Maarten during Spring and Summer. Based in Chapel Hill, N.C., on January 22, 2026, Divi Resorts, a prominent Caribbean holiday company with over 50 years of expertise, is offering special deals. Plan your getaway and save big!

data.title: Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP is investigating claims for investors of SLM Corporation between July 25, 2025 and August 14, 2025. Contact James Wilson for options.
data.description: Investors who experienced losses in SLM between July 25, 2025, and August 14, 2025, are urged by James (Josh) Wilson, a Securities Litigation Partner at Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP, to reach out directly to explore potential courses of action. If you bought or obtained securities during this period and wish to discuss your options, contact him for assistance.

data.title: OpenGov receives 7 placements in Built In's Best Places to Work list. OpenGov India recognized as one of the best startups at The Shape of Work Summit in 2025. San Francisco, Jan 22, 2026.
data.description: In the recent Built In's Best Places to Work List, OpenGov has secured an impressive seven placements. Adding to their accolades is OpenGov India, recognized as one of the top startups to work for in 2025 at The Shape of Work Summit in Bangalore. This achievement was celebrated at a gathering in San Francisco on January 22, 2026. OpenGov, known for its innovative AI and ERP software solutions, continues to make waves in the industry with these significant recognitions.
